note: mtime is a native Date from FileSystem.File.Info (Effect FS API returns Date). Extracting epoch millis from an instant. Replacement is DateTime.toEpochMillis(DateTime.unsafeFromDate(mtime)). Source Date is unavoidable (FS contract); human should confirm whether wrapping in DateTime is worthwhile vs. keeping the direct getTime on an externally-typed Date.

mtime is a native Date from FileSystem.File.Info. Instant->epoch-millis conversion. Replacement DateTime.toEpochMillis(DateTime.unsafeFromDate(mtime)). Source Date is supplied by the FS API; human should confirm DateTime wrap is desired.
